_comment: Per-client configuration for Speed to Lead. Sensitive values (Twilio SID/token, google_key) must be stored as n8n environment variables. This file stores only non-sensitive values and the registry of required env var names.

env_vars_required.MARTIN_GOOGLE_KEY: Shared secret from Google Ads Lead Form settings for Cabinet Martin
env_vars_required.MARTIN_TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID: Twilio Account SID for Cabinet Martin (from Twilio Console)
env_vars_required.MARTIN_TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN: Twilio Auth Token for Cabinet Martin (from Twilio Console)
env_vars_required.MARTIN_TWILIO_SENDER_ID: Alphanumeric sender ID for Cabinet Martin — max 11 chars, e.g. CabMartin
env_vars_required.BREVO_API_KEY: Shared — from app.brevo.com > Settings > API Keys
env_vars_required.BAPTISTE_PHONE: Baptiste's mobile in E.164 format — receives error fallback SMS
env_vars_required.MARTIN_WHATSAPP_SENDER: E.164 phone number registered as WhatsApp sender in Twilio WABA — e.g. +33600000002 (NOT alphanumeric)
env_vars_required.MARTIN_WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_SID: ContentSid for prospect confirmation template — format HXabc...
env_vars_required.MARTIN_WHATSAPP_OWNER_TEMPLATE_SID: ContentSid for owner notification template — format HXdef...

_rgpd_note: Pre-launch requirement: Lead Form must include a pre-unchecked consent checkbox: 'J accepte d etre contacte(e) par SMS par Cabinet Martin Avocats concernant ma demande.' Consent must be collected before first production send.
